name: eval/data/hyper_adk_smoke.test.json
description: Smoke-cycle evals for safe synthetic HyperAgents-ADK execution.

parts.text: Run a smoke self-learning cycle on the bundled S&P 500 smoke data and summarize the factor templates, best validation metric result, meta-agent diagnosis, and safety caveats.

The response should use synthetic sp500_smoke data, mention whitelisted templates, summarize the best candidate and meta diagnosis, and state that no Docker or arbitrary generated-code execution occurred.
List local smoke engine runs and inspect the most recent run. Explain how the manifest proves the public-safe execution boundary.

The response should inspect smoke run manifests, mention docker_launched false, arbitrary_generated_code_executed false, template_execution_only true, and distinguish smoke execution from large-study evidence.
